  Cursor Agent
  v2026.06.11-abcdef0
  Use /mcp to connect Cursor to your tools and data sources.
  Hit shift+tab to enable Plan Mode for large or complex changes.

  ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness


  explain in 3 sentences what a hash map is, then write a 6-line python example


  A hash map is a data structure that stores key-value pairs. It uses a hash
  function to map keys to indices in an underlying array, giving average O(1)
  lookups. Collisions are handled by chaining or open addressing.

  scores = {"alice": 95, "bob": 87, "carol": 92}
  print(scores["alice"])  # lookup by key

  ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness
